message:
feat(core): asupersync Notify migration, cx nested spawn tests, codec async-asupersync feature, and dep eradication updates

runtime_compat.rs: Add asupersync::sync::Notify re-export behind
asupersync-runtime feature, replacing tokio Notify for production
builds.

cx.rs: New tests — spawn_bounded_supports_nested_runtime_compat_spawn
and spawn_with_timeout_supports_nested_spawn_bounded_with_cx
(asupersync-runtime feature gated).

manifest_dep_eradication.rs: Update feature names to match upstream
renames — async-io-support -> async-io, async-io-backend -> async-io,
smol-compat -> async-smol.  Codec crate now defaults to
async-asupersync.  FeatureAlignment entries updated with current
migration state.

vendored_migration_map.rs: Migration map updates for runtime feature
alignment.

frankenterm-core/Cargo.toml: Enable async-asupersync feature on codec
dependency.

frankenterm-gui, mux-server-impl, mux-server Cargo.toml: Dependency
adjustments.

session_restore.rs, proptest tests: Minor test updates.

runtime.rs: Stream exit channel mutability fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ anyhow.workspace = true
 frankenterm-core.workspace = true
 
 # Vendored FrankenTerm crates (ex-WezTerm)
-codec.workspace = true
+codec = { workspace = true, features = ["async-smol"] }
 config.workspace = true
 filedescriptor.workspace = true
 frecency.workspace = true

@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ jemalloc = ["dep:frankenterm-alloc", "frankenterm-alloc/jemalloc"]
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
-async_ossl.workspace = true
+async_ossl = { workspace = true, default-features = false, features = ["async-io"] }
 clap.workspace = true
 config.workspace = true
 frankenterm-alloc = { workspace = true, optional = true }
